name: payments
title: Payments
description: Unified payment system with Stripe, Lemon Squeezy, and Polar providers — checkout flows, webhook handlers, and subscription management.

files.content: export * from "./lemonsqueezy";

docs: Unified payment system supporting Stripe, Lemon Squeezy, and Polar. Each provider auto-enables via env vars: `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` + `STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` (Stripe), `LEMONSQUEEZY_API_KEY` + `LEMONSQUEEZY_STORE_ID` (Lemon Squeezy), `POLAR_ACCESS_TOKEN` (Polar). Includes webhook handlers, checkout flows, and subscription management. Requires `DATABASE_URL` for storing payment records.
